description_long: This object is a handheld flashlight with a cylindrical body and a slightly wider, faceted head. The main body is matte black with subtle yellow-green accent lines running along its length and around the head and tail. The head features a logo and branding, while the opposite side has a rectangular, slightly raised button or switch, likely for power control. A thin wrist strap is attached near the tail, providing portability and ease of carrying. The surface appears to be made of durable plastic or polymer, with a grippy texture for secure handling. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or during nighttime activities.
description: A modern, black handheld flashlight with yellow-green accents, a wrist strap, and a prominent power button. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for portable urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo and branding on the head, with the wrist strap visible on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular power button on the head and the faceted design.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with the logo visible and the wrist strap hanging to the right.
description_view_3: Back view showing a continuous yellow-green accent line running vertically along the body.
